item.title: Skill management — clawhq skill install/list/update/remove
steps: Create src/cli/skill.ts with skill subcommand group
Implement `clawhq skill list`: show installed skills with version, source, status (active/disabled), last-used timestamp

Implement `clawhq skill install <name|url>`: fetch skill, sandbox in isolated container, scan for suspicious patterns (outbound network calls, filesystem access outside workspace, credential access), present for user approval before activation
On approval: update TOOLS.md, trigger Stage 2 rebuild if skill requires container-level dependencies
Implement `clawhq skill remove <name>`: deactivate skill, remove from TOOLS.md, keep rollback snapshot for 30 days
Implement `clawhq skill update <name>`: sandbox and vet new version before replacing; old version kept as rollback
Write unit tests for skill vetting logic and lifecycle operations
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq skill install` sandboxes and vets skill before presenting user approval prompt
User must explicitly approve before skill is activated — no auto-install
TOOLS.md is updated correctly on install and remove
`clawhq skill update` vets new version before replacing old — old version is rollback target
